title: Plank variety
description: Gives planks a little more variety.
body:
This texture pack gives planks a little more variety. This pack includes every plank texture. This pack will be updated with every new minecraft release!

![Every plank texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/161a10fb0114adb186739349ddd165c83bfd6f04_0.webp)

Join the discord to give suggestions or report bugs!
